# AI-related: usr/share/mios/mios.toml, tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py, mios-pxe-hub.container
# /usr/share/containers/systemd/mios-netinfra-pxe.pod
# PXE boot provider pod.
# Members (each member .container declares Pod=mios-netinfra-pxe.pod):
#   mios-pxe-hub
[Unit]
Description='MiOS' Network infra PXE pod
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Pod]
PodName=mios-netinfra-pxe
Network=host

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
